---
title: "Contact page"
description: "Contact page — navbar, contact section, inline email + message form with submit button."
---

![Contact page preview](/templates/contact/preview.png)

<div className="anvilkit-template-meta">
	<code>@anvilkit/template-contact</code> <span>·</span> <span>v1.0.2</span>
</div>

## Scaffold from the CLI

```sh
npx anvilkit init --template contact my-site
```

## Composition

The committed `PageIR` wires the following node types at the root:

- `Navbar`
- `Section`
- `Input`
- `Button`

## Package details

A contact-us page.

Navbar, section with copy, inline email + message inputs, and a submit button. No form handler wired — users hook up their own.

## Install

```sh
npx anvilkit init --template contact my-site
```

## Composition

This template composes the following component packages:

- `@anvilkit/button`
- `@anvilkit/input`
- `@anvilkit/navbar`
- `@anvilkit/section`

## Editing

The canonical `PageIR` tree is committed at `src/page-ir.json`. The
package's default export bundles that IR with the manifest fields
(slug, name, description, preview, package list) into an
`AnvilkitTemplate`.

See `docs/decisions/003-core-templates-subpath.md` for the
`AnvilkitTemplate` contract.
